final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit DRAM cell with read and write capabilities. It has a data input (4 bits), a data output (4 bits), a read enable signal, a write enable signal, and a clock signal. The DRAM cell should remember the written data until it is overwritten. The read operation should output the stored data when the read enable signal is low and the write operation should store the input data when the write enable signal is low.
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire read_enable,
    input wire write_enable,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            memory <= data_in;   // Write data to memory on rising edge of clock
        end
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= memory;  // Read data from memory
        end
    end
endmodule
